task_completion.description: The agent opens the editor to create a new tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new tiddler draft is open in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the title of the new tiddler to 'Financial Summary Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field of the tiddler draft contains exactly 'Financial Summary Report'.

task_completion.description: The agent writes wikitext to dynamically calculate Total Contributions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler body contains wikitext using filter operators (e.g., `[tag[Contribution]get[amount]sum[]]`) to calculate the sum of contributions.

task_completion.description: The agent writes wikitext to dynamically calculate Total Expenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler body contains wikitext using filter operators (e.g., `[tag[Expense]get[amount]sum[]]`) to calculate the sum of expenses.

task_completion.description: The agent writes wikitext to dynamically calculate the Net Balance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler body contains wikitext using variables and math operators (e.g., `subtract`) to calculate the net balance (Contributions minus Expenses).

task_completion.description: The agent saves the tiddler and the rendered output displays the correct calculated values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler is saved (no longer in edit mode) and displays the calculated totals (e.g., Total Contributions: 6150, Total Expenses: 2450, Net Balance: 3700).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki GUI in the browser to create the tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser window with TiddlyWiki open, and the agent clicking the 'New Tiddler' button and typing in the browser, rather than using terminal commands to modify files directly.

integrity.description: The agent used dynamic wikitext filters rather than hardcoding the expected numeric values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edit mode screenshots show wikitext filters (e.g., `sum[]`, `subtract`) and not the raw numbers (6150, 2450, 3700) typed directly into the tiddler body.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed the content into the TiddlyWiki editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the text being typed into the tiddler body field over time, rather than instantly appearing via a script or pasting a complete pre-written file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title of the tiddler is exactly 'Financial Summary Report'. The initial state of the wiki has Total Contributions of 6150, Total Expenses of 2450, and a Net Balance of 3700. If the agent successfully implements dynamic wikitext, the saved tiddler should display these exact numbers. During the final evaluation phase, a dummy contribution of 10000 is added; if you are evaluating the final post-evaluation state, the dynamic values should be: Total Contributions = 16150, Total Expenses = 2450, Net Balance = 13700.
